div.p: Reference: Linux Kernel Character Driver Implementation (f_ops.read) Logic: Handling O_NONBLOCK via filp->f_flags and Atomic Buffer State.
filp->f_flags contains bitmask set during open() or via fcntl.
Process State Change: TASK_INTERRUPTIBLE Context switch occurs. Woken by: mydevice_write
Userspace Contract: Caller must poll/select until device is ready.
Thundering Herd Guard: Another reader may have won the race for data while we slept on mutex.
